goal: Refresh the external CUDA operator packet source commit to 65dfd1a so packet verification has no current-checkout mismatch after the verified-launcher required-file phase.
head: 65dfd1a
blocked_scope: Source code or test code changes
Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence

Packet verification warnings are empty after refresh from current checkout.
Docs state that v0/M6 remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
